hero.h1:
Your company is already using AI.
So is the regulation.
hero.lead: Qualyra classifies each of your AI use cases against a framework built from the European regulation, and hands you a report with an action plan at 1 month, 6 months and 1 year. Written for an executive, not for a lawyer.
hero.date: Obligations for high-risk systems apply from 2 August 2026.
tension.text: Prohibited practices carry fines of up to €35M or 7% of worldwide annual turnover (Article 99 of the regulation).
prod.h2: Half an hour. No consultancy, no appointment.
prod.aside: You declare your use cases, the engine applies its analysis framework, the report comes out. Everything you see below is generated by the tool, not by a consultant.
prod.a.d: Unacceptable, high, limited, minimal — the classification is computed by a framework built from the regulation, not estimated by hand. Your dashboard shows where you stand, use case by use case.
prod.b.t:
A report you can
put on the table.
prod.b.d: Executive summary, applicable obligations, personal-data alerts, an action plan 1 month / 6 months / 1 year with a suggested owner and estimated effort. A fixed, dated PDF, kept in your organisation's history.
method.s1.d: ChatGPT in production, CV scoring, support chatbot: for each one, the purpose, the data processed, the degree of automation.
method.s2.d: The questions adapt to the type of AI declared. You can pause and resume at any time.
method.s3.d: Risk level per use case, obligations, action plan. As a dated PDF, ready for your board.
posture.c1.d: No "subject to case-law interpretation" caveats. If a sentence in the report doesn't help you decide, it isn't there.
posture.ember.d: Before this date, your use-case mapping and impact assessments must be complete. Starting now means doing them calmly.
posture.c2.d: The classification comes from a grid of criteria, not an opinion. Two identical companies get the same result.
posture.c3.d: Every action has a suggested owner and an estimated effort. No to-do without an owner.
cta.title: The regulation won't wait. Your audit can start now.
cta.sub: Free. Half an hour. A dated report in your history.
contact.title: let's connect!
contact.sub: Feel free to reach out with any question or request. We'll get back to you as soon as possible.

contact.note: Our team usually replies within 24 business hours.
